notes: The R100 is a rental/staging variant with no rack ears — not rack-mountable (M10 truss/furniture mounting). Port list is common to all R100 sub-variants; the optical connector format differs by SKU (opticalCON QUAD vs. 2x opticalCON DUO). The official Lightware user manual (HTML) confirms: no RS-232, IR, or USB on the R100 (those are F-series features). The 5-pole Phoenix euroblock audio connectors carry one balanced stereo pair each (L+/L−/GND/R+/R−). EtherCON speed confirmed 1 Gbps. HDMI grade hdmi-2.0 confirmed. powerCON TRUE1 confirmed. Confidence is medium because the source is the HTML user manual (authoritative Lightware content) but it covers the whole UBEX family; R100-specific pages were not individually loaded.

ports.name: Optical 1
ports.note: Neutrik opticalCON connector (DUO or QUAD depending on variant). opticalCON is not in the allowed list; fiber-lc is the closest underlying fiber connector. Variants: 2xMM-QUAD uses 1x opticalCON QUAD (NO4FDW-A); 2xMM-2xDUO, 2xSM-2xDUO, and 2xSM-BiDi-DUO use 2x opticalCON DUO (NO2-4FDW-A); 2xSM-QUAD uses 1x opticalCON QUAD. SFP+ 10G per port.

ports.name: EtherCON 1
ports.note: Neutrik etherCON NE8FDV-YK locking RJ45, 1000Base-T full duplex

ports.name: EtherCON 2
ports.note: Neutrik etherCON NE8FDV-YK locking RJ45, 1000Base-T full duplex

ports.name: Audio In
ports.note: 5-pole Phoenix Combicon connector, balanced analog audio input for HDMI audio embedding

ports.name: Audio Out
ports.note: 5-pole Phoenix Combicon connector, balanced analog audio output for HDMI audio de-embedding

ports.name: AC In
ports.note: Neutrik powerCON TRUE1 NAC3MPX-WOT, 100–240 V, 50/60 Hz
